problem_statement: The GovernedPlanningProfile shadow dossier needs a schema-backed operator shadow-pilot evidence intake packet so future observations can be recorded without confusing the intake contract with runtime promotion evidence.
success_criteria: a deterministic validator emits the operator shadow-pilot evidence request from the current shadow dossier
the checked-in fixture remains AwaitingEvidence and matches the deterministic produced packet
the schema denies runtime promotion, execution, dispatch, runtime replanning, success claims, and terminal closure
the packet covers all five shadow dossier plan classes with uncollected operator observation placeholders
focused tests cover schema compatibility, fixture parity, missing plan class rejection, collected-observation rejection, and authority-drift rejection
non_goals: do not collect concrete operator observations
do not add a router, worker, scheduler, connector, or runtime registration path
do not claim replay, recovery, or terminal closure evidence
constraints: the evidence packet is local, read-only, deterministic, and reversible
all observations remain AwaitingEvidence until a later operator witness record exists
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved because the validator does not normalize or decompose text
evidence_required: deterministic validator and produced packet parity
SDLC design and security review artifacts
